channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matatu Operators Agree to One-Week Suspension to Continue Diesel Price Talks
item.description: Kenya’s matatu operators have agreed to suspend their nationwide strike for one week to allow fresh negotiations with the government over rising diesel prices. The decision came after tense disagreeme...

item.title: Nzimande Supports Ramaphosa’s Legal Challenge of Phala Phala Panel Report
item.description: Senior Cabinet Minister Blade Nzimande has publicly defended President Cyril Ramaphosa's decision to legally challenge the Section 89 panel report on the Phala Phala scandal, affirming that the presid...

item.title: Court sentences main suspect to death in teenage TikTok star Sana Yousaf’s murder
item.description: In Islamabad, a court has delivered the death sentence to Umar Hayat, the principal suspect in the murder of 17-year-old TikTok influencer Sana Yousaf. The verdict was announced by Judge Muhammad Afza...

item.title: Tinio rejects Paolo Duterte’s claims on P5-M cash and P15-M for later release funds
item.description: Former lawmaker Tinio has officially denied accusations made by Paolo Duterte concerning alleged mishandling of public funds. According to Duterte, Tinio was supposedly linked to P5 million in cash an...

item.title: Couple Injured in Berhampur Road Attack; Police Identify Suspects
item.description: In Berhampur city of Odisha, a distressing incident occurred on Monday night where a man and a woman were attacked while riding a motorcycle. According to police reports, a group of people intercepted...

item.title: Senator Requests DOJ Investigation into FBI Director Kash Patel Over Misconduct Allegations
item.description: Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-CT) formally requested that the Justice Department's internal watchdog investigate FBI Director Kash Patel, following multiple reports alleging misconduct. The investigat...

item.title: San Diego police had identified teen suspects before deadly mosque shooting
item.description: San Diego authorities were actively investigating and searching for teenage suspects linked to a tragic shooting at the city’s largest Islamic centre before the incident occurred. The attack resulted ...

item.title: Right-Wing Influencer Endorses Thomas Massie, Sparking Division in MAGA Movement
item.description: Far-right influencer Sneako has ignited a new wave of tension within the MAGA movement after publicly endorsing Representative Thomas Massie, a Kentucky Republican challenging Donald Trump's preferred...

item.title: Formula 1’s Path to Net-Zero Emissions Highlights Operational and Carbon Offset Challenges
item.description: Formula 1 is one of the most energy-intensive sports globally, with high emissions not only from cars but also from logistics, international travel, and event infrastructure. While the sport has pledg...

item.title: Trump Claims He Almost Authorized Military Strike on Iran Before Allied Pressure
item.description: On May 19, 2026, President Donald Trump stated that he was reportedly only an hour away from initiating a military strike against Iran when Middle Eastern allies, including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and th...

item.title: Nintendo announces Pictonico!, a mobile game that transforms your photos into minigames
item.description: Nintendo has revealed a new free-to-start mobile game, Pictonico!, which allows players to transform their own photos into quirky and chaotic minigames. Scheduled for release on 28 May for both Apple ...

item.title: Malacañang Denies Any Plans to Amend the Constitution or Weaken the Senate
item.description: Malacañang clarified on Tuesday that there are no ongoing discussions or plans to amend the 1987 Constitution, contrary to claims made by Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano. Undersecretary Claire Ca...

item.title: Security forces neutralise 22 India-backed terrorists in North Waziristan sanitisation operation
item.description: According to the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Pakistan security forces have successfully neutralised 22 terrorists in a sanitisation operation that started on 17th May in the Shewa area of ...

item.title: Betty Field: Celebrating the Depth and Talent of a Hollywood Character Actress
item.description: Betty Field (1913–1973) was a highly respected American actress known for her extraordinary emotional depth and skill in portraying complex, often troubled characters. Starting her career on Broadway ...

item.title: Cathy Wilcox’s Recent Political and Social Cartoons
item.description: Cathy Wilcox, a renowned Australian cartoonist, continues to provide her unique perspective on political and social issues through her illustrations. Her latest collection features a range of cartoons...

item.title: Practical home upgrades to improve winter warmth and energy efficiency in Canberra
item.description: Canberra winters can be harsh, especially for older homes that struggle to retain heat. Rising energy prices have prompted homeowners to seek smarter ways to stay warm without inflating their bills. U...

item.title: Uber's lobbying influences Halifax council on ride-hailing oversight
item.description: Newly released documents show that Halifax Mayor Andy Fillmore met with an Uber lobbyist just a day before persuading the city council to delay a vote on stricter regulations for ride-hailing drivers....

item.title: President Ramaphosa awards National Orders to South Africans and international allies, highlighting contributions in arts, science and community service
item.description: On 19 May 2026, President Cyril Ramaphosa conferred the National Orders to recognise South Africans and international allies who have made significant contributions to arts, culture, science, business...

item.title: How to Handle Stress While Searching for a Job
item.description: Searching for a job fit can be stressful, and many people forget that it affects not just your career but also your mind and emotions. Long periods without responses, slow feedback, and repeated near-...

item.title: Bushy Maape, former North West premier and liberation veteran, passes away aged 69
item.description: Former North West premier Bushy Maape passed away in Johannesburg on Saturday, 17 May 2026, at 2:49 pm after a short illness, surrounded by his children and family. The passing was confirmed by the cu...
